Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class PrivacySettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.PrivacySettings
public class PrivacySettings extends Metadata

Java class for PrivacySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PrivacySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="authorizationCaptureBrowser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizationCaptureEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizationCaptureIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizationCaptureLocation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizationCustomSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizationLockingAndVersioning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableConfigurableUserPIIActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableConsentAuditTrail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableConsentEventStream" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDefaultMetadataValues" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useUmaDefaultConsentRecs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
